creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
Still getting lost in git, but I think the prior kernel was built from sources of Oct. 29. I had a corruption in my src tree and my git pull had been failing without my noticing until I realized a commit that I was concerned with was missing. Sorry.

Since the system occasionally booted in the past, I'm now afraid to reboot. I restarted the interface (service netif stop wlan0 followed a few seconds later with a start). I have not rebooted.
